_A_TOOLTIP_COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION_: ATooltip displays additional information when the user hovers over or focuses an element.
_A_TOOLTIP_GROUP_TAG_DESCRIPTION_: You can change the HTML tag used for the tooltip trigger element.
_A_TOOLTIP_GROUP_MAX_WIDTH_DESCRIPTION_: Limits the maximum width of the tooltip content.
_A_TOOLTIP_GROUP_WIDTH_DESCRIPTION_: Sets a fixed width for the tooltip content.
_A_TOOLTIP_GROUP_TIME_CLOSE_DESCRIPTION_: Controls how long the tooltip remains visible after the pointer leaves the trigger or tooltip area.
_A_TOOLTIP_GROUP_HIDE_ARROW_DESCRIPTION_: The tooltip arrow can be hidden.
_A_TOOLTIP_GROUP_OFFSET_SKIDDING_DESCRIP: Moves the tooltip along the reference element axis.
_A_TOOLTIP_GROUP_OFFSET_DISTANCE_DESCRIP: Changes the distance between the tooltip and the trigger element.
_A_TOOLTIP_GROUP_ARROW_PADDING_DESCRIPTI: Sets the padding that limits how close the arrow can get to the tooltip edges.
_A_TOOLTIP_GROUP_ARROW_PADDING_FUNCTION_: Arrow padding can also be calculated dynamically with a callback function.
